about.summary:
Passionate software developer with 9+ years of experience, specializing in designing, building, and scaling cloud-native, distributed systems.

I love meeting new people and hearing about their unique experiences. I strongly believe that my personal success involves partnering with others and helping them succeed as well.

Outside of the office, I'm a photographer, musician, and tech enthusiast. While I usually occupy myself with various little hobbies, I will always make time for a coffee with a friend or colleague!

projects.title: AIR NETWORK VISION
projects.desc: Composed the 5-year vision for Amazon Air's network planning systems, incorporating Generative AI for automation and optimizing cross-org integrations.

projects.title: PLAN OF RECORD (POR)
projects.desc: Created a systematic integration standard for external airplane carriers to send real-time flight movement messages, enabling high-impact live decisions.

projects.title: GLOBAL CARGO EXPANSION
projects.desc: Led the dev-side expansion of US cargo flight business to Canada, Europe, and India, growing the business globally by ~285%.

bullets: Composed the 5 year vision for Amazon Air's network planning systems, optimizing integrations and incorporating Generative AI.
Oversaw all team initiatives while leading cross-org integration of Air systems with science team optimization models.
Facilitated an annual cost savings of over $140MM through network planning optimization.
Orchestrated multiple peak operation preparations (ORR) as the org leader and bar raiser.
Created the 'Plan of Record (POR)', a systematic integration standard for external airplane carriers to send real-time flight movement messages.
Led the dev-side expansion of the US cargo flight business to Canada, Europe, India, and intercontinental routes.
Grew the business globally by ~285% from 2019-2023 through strategic carrier integrations.
Established robust operational practices with monitoring, dashboards, and reliability-focused design.
Built multiple foundational systems from scratch at the inception of Amazon Air's cargo shipping business.
Pioneered Native AWS development by being one of the earliest fully NAWS cloud-based systems in the org.
Championed ReactJS as the standard for all Air UI pages, driving large-scale migrations from legacy jQuery.
Redesigned key functions into microservices, increasing speed and reusability for WebBroker.
Co-created a mobile payment splitting POC app in React Native, launched as a pilot to 5000 employees.
Developed an automated tool for managing web service certificate expiries, reducing production issues.
Led an associate project team of 11 to develop a full-stack tool revamping the associate program.

contact.quote: We are going to steal your heart... or just have a quick chat about your next big project.
